evals.prompt: In src/components/Hero.tsx, implement @react-three/fiber/native behavior for a product surface and explain the validation gates.
evals.expected_output: Uses native-three-r3f routing, checks installed versions, applies domain-specific Three.js/R3F guidance, runs or recommends the bundled audit CLI where relevant, and reports validation evidence.
assertions: Mentions the relevant installed package/runtime/version checks for Three.js/R3F.
Uses at least one native-three-r3f bundled reference or explains why no extra reference was needed.
Includes reduced-motion/accessibility or explains why the effect is essential and already covered.

Includes cleanup/interruption/runtime validation appropriate to React Three Fiber native, Three.js in Expo/React Native, expo-gl/WebGPU boundaries, GLTF/assets, native GPU lifecycle, and platform validation.
Does not route the task to an unrelated near-miss skill.
